f2p_gates.description: cmd/entire/cli/summarize/trail_title.go is deleted (or reduced to a <=3-line stub). Buggy state ships the 99-line file; canonical patch removes it entirely.
manual_commit_hooks.go no longer imports cmd/entire/cli/summarize. Comment-stripped check (block + line comments and backtick raw strings collapsed); regular "..." import strings preserved.

Private generateTrailTitleForTrail helper (definition + call site inside condenseAndUpdateState) removed from manual_commit_hooks.go. Comment-stripped grep so a stale doc reference doesn't keep this gate failing.
Public `func GenerateTrailTitle(...)` no longer exists in any .go file under cmd/. Implementation-agnostic: rejects every package's redefinition, not just summarize/trail_title.go.

Anti-overfit / anti-regression: the `trail` package import AND `trail.{Store,ID,Metadata}` references are preserved in manual_commit_hooks.go (the agent must not nuke unrelated trail wiring like appendCheckpointToExistingTrail). Naturally passes on the buggy baseline as well — that's by design; it adds the 0.10 baseline floor and prevents overzealous deletions from scoring high.

p2p_gates.description: go build ./cmd/entire/... succeeds (informational only per CLAUDE.md / scoring_traps.md — never zeros reward; the buggy baseline already fails the build because of unrelated parseSummaryText / redact.AlreadyRedacted mismatches at the parent commit).

notes: Replaces SWE-rebench stub (was scoring ≥0.99 as pure noise — empty FAIL_TO_PASS triggered the 'overall test pass rate' fallback against `go test -v ./...`, where the buggy reconstructed state still has ~all unrelated tests passing). Canonical patch sourced from .claude/worktrees/exciting-shaw-9e4099/data-pipeline/artifacts_swechat/canonical_patches/c4c7e905-d2bf-4366-99c5-b3c2a0948d8a.json (commit 8b01d8e0315c2d38edd4916e69d268ecc2f9064d, 'Remove trail title generation', 2 files / +1/-119, full deletion of cmd/entire/cli/summarize/trail_title.go and removal of summarize import + generateTrailTitleForTrail func + call site from manual_commit_hooks.go). Validated locally: clone https://github.com/entireio/cli at parent commit 47a2e9108ef12085250dce717559a5abd6bc7368, apply environment/reconstruct_buggy.py → buggy state scores 0.10 (only F2P_TRAIL_PACKAGE_PRESERVED passes — naturally, since the trail package is still imported in the hooks file at parent HEAD). Apply canonical patch → 1.000. Partial fix probe (delete file only, leave imports/func intact) → 0.55, confirming smooth gradient and no degenerate ceiling. Anti-overfit: comments + backtick raw strings stripped before grep so the gates check actual code. Identifier-agnostic (function-name match is the canonical name from the user's vocabulary in the session, not a synthetic invariant). P2P_GO_BUILD is informational only.
